intentSynonyms: get user busy times in calendly
look up user busy times in calendly
fetch a single user busy times in calendly
view one specific user busy times in calendly
get busy time slots for a date range in calendly
description: Get busy time slots for the current user within a date range. Returns both Calendly events and external calendar events that block availability. Requires start_time and end_time in ISO 8601 format.

start_time.description: Start of the time range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2026-03-10T00:00:00Z")

end_time.description: End of the time range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2026-03-17T00:00:00Z")
